name: Secret Sect Druid Dru
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>暗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>躍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>やく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のドルイド・ドリュース
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 Level 4 DARK monster in your Graveyard with 0 ATK and/or DEF, except "Secret Sect Druid Dru"; Special Summon that target in face-up Defense Position. Its effects are negated. You can only use the effect of "Secret Sect Druid Dru" once per turn.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 Level 4 DARK monster in your Graveyard with 0 ATK and/or DEF, except "Secret Sect Druid Dru"; Special Summon that target in face-up Defense Position. Its effects are negated. You can only use the effect of "Secret Sect Druid Dru" once per turn.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 Level 4 DARK monster in your Graveyard with 0 ATK and/or DEF, except "Secret Sect Druid Dru"; Special Summon that target in face-up Defense Position. Its effects are negated. You can only use the effect of "Secret Sect Druid Dru" once per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
